special_mechanics.name: Diving
special_mechanics.description: Player controls own jumps with button input rather than following predefined sequence. Allows experienced players to achieve marks above 9.0 on 3.5-difficulty dives; poor input timing results in 0.0 scores.

special_mechanics.name: Pole Vault
special_mechanics.description: Experienced players can clear 6.35 m with practice. Event difficulty increases with game difficulty level.

special_mechanics.name: Button Mashing Gameplay
special_mechanics.description: Primary mechanic for sprinting, hurdles, and hammer throw events. Not used in archery; slow-paced in swimming.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Wikipedia source provides gameplay description but no quantitative physics parameters. Game features event-specific mechanics (diving, pole vault) with narrative descriptions of difficulty progression and player control options, but exact movement values, gravity calculations, and acceleration rates are not documented.
